Registry / Terms / electronic sub-assembly

electronic sub-assembly

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00599 · 21 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 14 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

14 distinct definitions across 21 publications. 4 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).
